questionHtml:
Roma now uses a quadratic function to model the charge in the phone. They calculate that, when using this model, the sum of the square residuals for these four points is 2.45.

State one reason why Roma might prefer to use
markschemeHtml:
The sum of the square residuals is smaller so it is a better fit          R1

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one reason why Roma might prefer to use the quadratic model. P=100-100×2-t.
